entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A rainfed crop predominantly grown in Rajasthan, India, prone to abiotic stresses.

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: A state in North-western India characterized as a rainfed pearl millet ecosystem.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on pearl millet was conducted.

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: An abiotic stress, also known as drought, affecting crop productivity.

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: An abiotic stress that negatively impacts crop growth and yield.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors such as drought and heat that cause stress to crops.

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The capacity of crop cultivars to maintain productivity under adverse environmental conditions.

entities.name: GEOSPATIAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: A technique used for monitoring changes in cropped area and identifying stress-prone regions.

entities.name: SENTINEL-2 TIME-SERIES DATA
entities.description: Satellite-based data used for the spatial distribution mapping of pearl millet.

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Analytical methods used to map pearl millet areas using satellite data.

entities.name: CLIMATE SMART TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Resilient agricultural technologies designed to minimize production risks for farmers.

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, nutritious food.
